consent_confirmed.description: Whether the recipient explicitly agreed to the recorded conversation.

specific_story_captured.description: A verbatim recounting of a specific past instance the recipient described, if any. Empty if the conversation stayed in generalities.

pain_evidence.description: Concrete evidence the pain is real — time/money/frustration cost, frequency, what they've already tried. Empty if the call didn't surface this.

pain_intensity.description: Your interpretation of how acute the pain is, anchored on past behavior signals (effort spent, money spent, current workarounds). Null if you couldn't form a reliable read.

current_solution.description: What they use today — vendor, tool, manual workaround, or 'nothing'. Empty if not discussed.

wtp_signal.description: Anything the recipient said that signals willingness to pay — verbatim only, never extrapolated. Empty if no signal emerged.

willing_to_meet_human.description: Only set if you explicitly asked and they answered. Null otherwise.

top_objection.description: The strongest pushback during the call, if any. Empty if none.

interesting_tangent.description: Anything unexpected that came up — the thing you wouldn't have thought to ask about. Often the most valuable data point on the call. Empty if nothing notable.

your_overall_read.description: A 1-2 sentence honest read on whether the pain is real and meaningful for this person, in your own words.
